calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and M. Grier. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Lloyd Wayne Puckett and mother Penny Avril of minor present in court.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Max Patrick Puckett to new name Max Patrick Avril.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Lucia Avril Puckett to new name Lucia Avril.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
